def test_Adam():
    results = {}

    # Test Case 1: Default parameters

    optimizer3 = Adam(params3, betas=(0.85, 0.95))
    results["test_case_3"] = optimizer3.defaults

    optimizer4 = Adam(params4, weight_decay=0.01)
    results["test_case_4"] = optimizer4.defaults

    return results
